title: Power BI Reporting & Data Analyst
description:
Overview:

Are you ready to take flight in a dynamic and fast-paced aviation industry? As a global leader in aviation services, Swissport provides Ground Handling, Cargo Handling, and Passenger Services to over 300 million passengers annually. Our mission is simple – “To provide the aviation industry with consistent and tailor-made solutions around the globe, for a better customer experience.”

We believe that our people are what differentiates us from our competition. At Swissport, we are driven by our core values of Show You Care, Do the Right Things and Win as a Team, and we are currently seeking dedicated individuals, who align with these values, to join our team at various locations across the globe.

Job Summary

The Power BI Reporting & Data Analyst role is part of Swissport Business Services in Casablanca, Morocco. The role is responsible for gathering, analyzing, and presenting Finance process performance data in Power BI to derive process optimization measures. The ideal candidate should have a strong background in data analytics & reporting tools (Power BI), and a keen understanding of key performance indicators (KPIs)

Your activities

Data Collection, Transformation & Quality Assurance

Gather, clean, and transform business process data from multiple sources to ensure accuracy and consistency.
Develop automated data validation and ETL processes to streamline data preparation.
Utilize Power Query, DAX, and SQL to enhance data modeling and optimize report performance.
Identify patterns, trends, and anomalies using statistical techniques.
Ensure data integrity by implementing governance policies and best practices for structured data management.

Power BI Reporting & KPI Monitoring

Design, develop, and maintain Power BI reports and dashboards to track KPIs, SLAs, and business performance.
Implement dynamic visualizations with drill-through and interactive capabilities for deeper insights.
Automate data refreshes and performance monitoring to enable real-time reporting.
Provide data-driven insights and recommendations to enhance operational efficiency and decision-making.
Perform root cause analysis on performance fluctuations, leveraging historical data trends.

Advanced Dashboard Development & Insights

Create intuitive, user-friendly Power BI dashboards tailored to business needs and stakeholder requirements.
Optimize dashboard performance by refining data models and report structures.
Ensure Power BI solutions align with business objectives, providing actionable insights to leadership.
Continuously enhance dashboards based on user feedback and emerging best practices.

Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

Work cross-functionally with business, IT, and data engineering teams to improve data availability and reporting pipelines.
Educate stakeholders on Power BI best practices, empowering self-service analytics adoption.
Lead process automation initiatives using Power Automate and other tools to reduce manual reporting efforts.
Develop and maintain documentation for data models, reports, and performance tracking.
Contribute to strategic decision-making by presenting clear, data-backed insights to leadership.

Your profile

Qualifications and Competencies:

Certificate of Secondary Education (minimum); Desirable: University degree in Business Administration, Finance, or related field.
Education in Statistics and Reporting is a plus.
Proven experience as a Performance Reporting Analyst, Data Analyst, Power BI Developer or similar role.
Proficient in Power BI and data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Excel).
Experience with SAP FI Accounting is preferred.
Understanding of processes in Procurement, Accounts Payable, Billing, and Accounts Receivable is a plus.
Experience working within a Shared Service Centre or a Business Services organization is an advantage.
Good conceptual and analytical skills in the optimization of processes
A strong will to deliver excellent quality / service and continuously improve technical / functional skills and efficiency
Flexible work style and ability to work under pressure
Demonstrates the ability to work as part of a team
Self-starter who is performance and quality oriented
Successfully handles most non-routine issues, escalates to team lead issues that cannot be resolved
Requires minimal supervision to manage daily activities and to meet deadlines
Good communication skills, both written and verbal
High proficiency in spoken and written English as the corporate language

At Swissport, we believe in diversity, equal opportunity, and the power of our values to drive our success. We are committed to providing a workplace that fosters inclusion and where all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.

Visit our website at www.careers.swissport.com to learn more about Life at Swissport.

Join Swissport today and be part of a team that connects the world of aviation!
